response.justification: Sarah is a seasoned full-stack engineer with strong TypeScript and Node.js breadth, but the resume does not satisfy the core requirement of 8+ years building AI-driven solutions. Her GenAI work is limited to her current role (started April 2025, roughly one month of tenure), and there is no mention of Python, vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM evaluation frameworks — all of which are central to this Staff FDE role. While her MCP tooling and agentic-workflow contributions are directly relevant signals, they are too nascent to justify a staff-level GenAI hire.
strengths: Hands-on MCP (Model Context Protocol) server and agentic-workflow development at current role aligns precisely with a listed key technology
Deep TypeScript/Node.js expertise with demonstrated AWS CDK usage covers one of the two primary languages and the cloud platform requirement
Long track record of staff-level engineering and knowledge-sharing (workshops, talks, open-source projects) supports the mentorship and technical-leadership responsibilities
concerns: Python is absent from the skills section and work history despite being a primary required language for the role
No evidence of vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM performance evaluation — the technical core of the GenAI stack this role demands
GenAI experience is limited to approximately one month at the current employer; the role requires a minimum of 8 years building production AI solutions
